name: Calzone Recipes
recipeInstructions:
1. Unroll the pizza dough. Roll or stretch it into a 15x10-inch rectangle.
2. Cut into 6 5-inch squares.
3. Divide the desired filling among the squares.
4. Brush the edges of the dough with water.
5. Lift one corner and stretch the dough over to the opposite corner, pressing the edges of the dough well with a fork to seal.
6. Arrange on a greased baking sheet. Prick the tops with a fork.
7. Combine egg and 1 tablespoon water. Brush onto the calzones.
8. Sprinkle with Parmesan cheese if desired.
9. Bake at 425°F for 8-10 minutes. Let stand 5 minutes before serving. Makes 6 calzones.
Sausage-Mushroom Filling:
In a skillet, cook 12 ounces bulk pork sausage or Italian sausage until brown. Drain.
Ham-Spinach Filling:
Cook 1 10-ounce package of frozen chopped spinach according to package directions. Drain well.
In a bowl, combine the cooked spinach, 1 cup finely chopped fully cooked ham (5 ounces), 1 cup shredded Swiss cheese (4 ounces), and 2 tablespoons thinly sliced green onion.
